full_text:
Hao Guang
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hao Guang. Admired Sima Zhi, demoting his Registrar based on Sima Zhi’s complaint. Hao Guang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
